name: Thinking Indicators
summary: Animated visual indicators showing when an AI agent is in a thinking/processing state. Includes a pulsing dot indicator and an expandable thinking bar.
goals: Provide visual feedback when the agent is processing a request
Display animated indicators that convey active processing state
Show thinking content when available from the agent

acceptanceCriteria.then: an animated indicator appears in the chat

end-to-end.then: a visual indicator shows the agent is thinking

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
